title: Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2024
body: "Quarterly reports of laboratory-confirmed cases of hepatitis C in England and Wales in 2023.  Previous hepatitis C reports are available at:    Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2022   Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2021   Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2020 [Q3 and Q4]   Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2020 [Q1 and Q2]   Hepatitis C (England and Wales): 2019    For earlier reports, see Laboratory reports of hepatitis A and C: 2018. "
